title: fix: show platform badge on app cards
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Badges de-cloaked
gist.blurb: The platform badges on app cards were taking minimalism a bit too far. We convinced them to be visible again.
gist.summary: Restored the default styling for platform badges on app cards by removing aggressive CSS overrides.
gist.impact: Users can now easily identify supported platforms (Web, Android, iOS) when browsing the app showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot inspecting a floating UI card where a badge has just magically appeared. Represents the restoration of visibility.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot inspecting a floating app card where a shiny new badge has just appeared. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel font text: 'VISIBLE'. Nostalgic but beautiful.
